name: Hraesvelgr, the Desperate Doom Eagle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のフレスヴェイス
desc:
2+ WIND monsters
Gains 2400 ATK while your opponent has no monsters in their GY. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Hraesvelgr, the Desperate Doom Eagle" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
